title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
slides: Can a startup surpass Nvidia in AI chips?
Etched just hit a $5 billion valuation.
Its chip delivers 10x speed for inference tasks.
This could slash your AI deployment costs overnight.
Test your models on their hardware before rivals do.
thread_text:
1. Can one startup dethrone Nvidia?

Etched just secured a $5 billion valuation—before shipping a single chip.

2. A chip built for inference only.

Their hardware claims 10x speed on AI tasks—no training, no bloat.

3. Your costs could crash overnight.

Deploy on Etched and the inference bill shrinks by an order of magnitude.

4. Early access is the real prize.

Test your models on their silicon before competitors even get a slot.

5. What’s your next move?

Run one inference-heavy model on your current setup. Then calculate the gap. Ready to switch?
video_script: Etched hit five billion dollars valuation.
Their chip runs inference ten times faster.
This could slash your deployment costs dramatically.
Test your models on their hardware now.
Is your current setup leaving money on the table?

script: Etched hit five billion dollars valuation.
Their chip runs inference ten times faster.
This could slash your deployment costs dramatically.
Test your models on their hardware now.
Is your current setup leaving money on the table?

instagram.caption:
A startup just hit a $5 billion valuation, selling a chip that delivers 10x speed on AI inference tasks — before shipping a single unit to the public.

That chip skips AI training entirely, focusing only on running models once they're built.  
For teams paying for inference by the second, an order-of-magnitude drop in computing cost is on the table.  
Your current hardware stack might become obsolete faster than you budgeted for.

The concrete shift: your next AI deployment could cost one-tenth as much to run, overnight.

Are you already testing your heaviest model against a 10x hardware improvement — or waiting until competitors lock in their pricing first?

carousel_slides.description: Etched’s chip claims 10x speed for inference, slashing deployment bills by an order of magnitude.
Etched reached a $5B valuation before shipping a single chip—built solely for inference, no bloat.
Their dedicated hardware delivers 10x speed, turning heavy models into lightweight operations.
